headline: Maine set to become first state with data center ban
summary: More than a dozen other states are considering similar bans as fears around centers and high energy prices grow.

headline: Dominion Energy’s Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind Project Generates First Power
summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) is included among the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends. Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) provides regulated electricity service to 3.6 million homes and businesses in Virginia, North Carolina, and South Carolina, and regulated natural gas service to 500,000 customers in South Carolina.
